case_title: SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC vs. DAVIS, GERALDINE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAXE REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, GERALDINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1743 GOLDEN GATE #6, S.F. CA $7,971.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,971.60, STAYED UNTIL MAR-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMT AS LENGTH FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
